name: bizops
description: A complete business operations toolkit for small business owners. Covers daily briefings, client onboarding, invoicing, pipeline management, hiring, financial snapshots, SOPs, travel planning, and more. Works across all industries.

skills.name: bizops-daily-brief
skills.description: CEO-level daily briefing — today's priorities, fires, deadlines, project status, and focus areas.

skills.name: bizops-client-onboarding
skills.description: Onboard new clients — create contact records, project files, welcome materials, onboarding checklists, and intake workflows.

skills.name: bizops-invoice-generator
skills.description: Generate professional invoices and track billing history.

skills.name: bizops-pipeline-sync
skills.description: Pipeline intelligence — deal velocity, stale deals, revenue forecast, and pipeline health.

skills.name: bizops-lead-tracker
skills.description: Track leads through pipeline stages — add, update, and manage leads and deals.

skills.name: bizops-follow-up
skills.description: Track follow-ups and commitments — add, list, complete, and get reminders for open loops.

skills.name: bizops-financial-snapshot
skills.description: Executive financial summary — P&L, revenue by stream, expense breakdown, cash flow projection, and recommendations.

skills.name: bizops-kpi-dashboard
skills.description: KPI tracking — define, update, and report on key performance indicators.

skills.name: bizops-hiring-screener
skills.description: Build hiring packages — job descriptions, screening questions, scorecards, and offer templates.

skills.name: bizops-sop-builder
skills.description: Build SOPs — document processes, create runbooks, playbooks, and workflow documentation.

skills.name: bizops-people
skills.description: Contact management — create, update, search, and query people in the brain.

skills.name: bizops-weekly-review
skills.description: Weekly review — recap what got done, assess goal progress, and plan next week.

skills.name: bizops-travel-plan
skills.description: Plan trips — flights, hotels, itinerary, ground transportation, restaurants, packing, and pre-trip timeline.

skills.name: bizops-budget-builder
skills.description: Build and track a business budget — create budgets, log actuals, analyze variances, and flag overspend.

skills.name: bizops-vendor-tracker
skills.description: Track vendors and suppliers — contracts, renewal dates, costs, and spend audits.

skills.name: bizops-project-tracker
skills.description: Track multi-milestone internal projects — create projects, update milestones, flag blockers, and view project dashboard.
triggers: what projects are we working on
